hero.title:
Your farm,

in real time.
hero.body: Growcast unifies silos, warehouses and crops in a single monitoring platform. Real-time data, from field to decision.
sensors.title: Your whole operation, one network.
sensors.body: Temperature, humidity, CO₂, conductivity and pH: every variable, at every point, streaming to a central core.
data.title: Raw data becomes structure.
data.body: Time series, thresholds and early alerts: every variable, ordered and ready to act on.
converge.title: It all converges in Growcast.
converge.body: We measure every variable, control irrigation and climate, and trace every batch — from sensor to decision, in a single source of truth.
metric.temp.label: TEMPERATURE
metric.hum.label: HUMIDITY
metric.co2.label: CO₂
metric.ec.label: CONDUCTIVITY
metric.ph.label: pH
metric.air.label: AIRFLOW
dialog.title: Let's talk about your farm
dialog.sub: We'll reply on WhatsApp. Leave your name and a message and we'll start the conversation.
dialog.defaultMsg: Hi Growcast, I'd like to book a meeting to learn about the platform.
